text: Meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri language ka mazaak udaya aur layoff ki dhamki di, tab se mera dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai. Is bheed wale metro shehar mein main akela bas PG ke kamre mein roye ja raha hoon, na khane ka hosh hai na aage ka rasta sujhh raha hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki lagta hai sab mitti mein mil gaya.

Boss ne team ke samne chilla kar mujhe 'unfit' bol diya aur tab se main itna overwhelmed hoon ki laptop kholne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Gaon mein kisan baap ne karz lekar mujhe MNC bheja tha, par ab is humiliation ne mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Main is waqt remittance ya EMI ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa raha, bas ek gehra sannata aur darr mehsus ho raha hai.

Aaj Boss ne meri capability par sabke samne sawal uthaya toh mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya ki saans lena bhi bojh lag raha hai. MNC ki ye naukri meri identity thi, par is bezatti ne mujhe poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar bana diya hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi taane goonj rahe hain aur main bas sunn hokar leta hoon, aage plan karna namumkin lag raha hai.

Boss ne sabke samne mere kaam ko kachra bol diya aur tab se main itna ghut raha hoon ki rona ruk hi nahi raha. Ghar ki EMI aur kirana shop ka karz kaise chukega ye toh door ki baat hai, pehle ye jo dukh dimaag mein baith gaya hai usne mujhe duba diya hai. Is waqt main koi career solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bacha, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh hoon.

Meeting mein Boss ke taane sunne ke baad se main bas sunn hokar baitha hoon, dimaag mein sirf wahi humiliation ka loop chal raha hai. Pehle hi sarkari naukri fail hone ka darr tha aur ab is layoff ke khatre ne mujhe poori tarah flood kar diya hai. Kuch bhi sochna toh door, mujhe ye bhi hosh nahi ki kab din se raat ho gayi, bas gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai.
